title: Iran is not Venezuela, despite Trump’s hopes of repeating ‘regime capture’ strategy
summary_full: Experts say US influence over South American neighbour will be hard to replicate in country with deep and long-standing antipathy to the westFirst, the CIA tracks the head of an oil-rich, US-baiting nation to a heavily guarded compound at the heart of his country’s mountain-flanked capital.Then, that leader is removed from power with a deadly and irresistible show of US military force. Continue reading...
